Scelochilus fuscatus is a type of orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Scelochilus fuscatus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
